key_phrases: Q1 results do not impact our guidance, since we have already taken into consideration the expected slow performance in Q1 and Q2
cash and cash equivalents stood at INR 864 crore, marking an increase of INR 109 crore
guidance of maintaining a 16% CAGR over a period of three years is intact
the industry by itself has not been doing too great since quarter three of the last year
growth is projected to be in single digits for the whole year basis
